arts.ttl: Erling Haaland hits 99th Man City goal as Forest stun Liverpool at Anfield
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola’s side now sit top of the table after beating Brentford.

arts.ttl: Inevitable Haaland sees City past lively Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester City beat Brentford 2-1 at home on Saturday to maintain their perfect start to the Premier League season after Erling Haaland netted twice following the fastest goal of the season from the visitors.

arts.ttl: Who else? Haaland rescues Man City after early Brentford scare
arts.sum: Highlights from the Premier League clash between Manchester City and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Man City 2-1 Brentford: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Haaland nets brace
arts.sum: Erling Haaland scores twice as Manchester City come from behind to beat Brentford 2-1 in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland double sinks Brentford after Wissa jolts Manchester City
arts.athr: Jamie Jackson at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Erling Haaland now has nine goals in Manchester City’s opening four Premier League matches, a mark that sets a record, eclipsing Wayne Rooney’s eight of 2011-12. In an invigorating contest, his latest double claimed the three points to secure a maximum 12 from 12 for the champions. The No 9’s goals were met by what appeared a muted celebration after his loss this past week of a close family friend, Ivar Eggja. Haaland has a mind-bending 99 in 103 in all competitions in City colours. With the Premier League case against the club commencing on Monday, there is zero sign their players are distracted. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Rodri names Man City's two biggest Premier League title threats
arts.sum: The Cityzens have seen off a strong challenge from Arsenal over the past couple of seasons, with Liverpool, under the management of Jurgen Klopp, City's biggest adversaries prior to that. Rodri expects Arsenal and Liverpool to be Manchester City's biggest threats as they bid to win an unprecedented fifth consecutive Premier League title.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne snub for Erling Haaland sums up Man City after comeback vs Brentford
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland won three points for his team but they weren't going to risk the result for his hat-trick

arts.ttl: Record-breaking Haaland at the double as Man City edge Brentford
arts.sum: Erling Haaland's ridiculous scoring start to the season rolled on as he scored his eighth and ninth goals in Man City's 2-1 win over Brentford.

arts.ttl: Man City 2-1 Brentford: Erling Haaland continues stunning start to the season with a brace as hosts come from behind after Yoane Wissa shocked champions after just 22 seconds
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN AT ETIHAD STADIUM: Erling Haaland rescued Manchester City from an early setback as Pep Guardiola's side retained their 100 per cent Premier League record.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland continues hot streak with decisive double for Manchester City
arts.sum: The defending champions came from behind to beat Brentford.
